name: Markdown Renderer
short_descr: Converts a Markdown document to HTML, optionally applying CSS
long_descr: Call the application at /. It fetches the Markdown document from the path and converts it to HTML. Specify styles via HEAD; set it to an empty string to supply your own CSS in the request body.

params.name: BASE
params.descr: Base origin URL; the request path is appended to form the Markdown source URL

params.name: HEAD
params.descr: Content injected into <head> of the generated HTML document

name: JWT Validation
short_descr: Validates a JWT passed in the Authorization header as "Bearer <token>"
long_descr: Validates the JWT signature and expiry before forwarding the request upstream. Returns 401 on failure.

params.name: JWKS_URI
params.descr: JWKS endpoint used to verify the token signature
